## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content updates, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New legislation in Mexico regarding dolphin encounters has prompted extensive content updates across all platforms](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Automated publishing remains a goal, with engineering team working on a solution](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Successful backlinking partnership established with Puerto Vallarta Tourist Bureau](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Performance continues to trend positively across all locations](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Challenges

  - [Angelica flagged needed updates to the private catamaran article, specifically vessel sizes](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [New Mexican legislation on dolphin encounters necessitating widespread content revisions:](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [Removal of certain activities (e.g., holding dolphins by fins)](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Updates to hero photos and all related imagery](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Addition of life jacket requirement in all visuals](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Temporary removal and reinstatement of certain programs in Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Automated Publishing Progress

  - [Longstanding goal since project inception with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Previous roadblock of inter-paragraph spacing now resolved](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Engineering team to work on automated publishing sprint](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Ideal workflow: publish text content first, manually add photos later](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Future aspiration: AI-tagged image library for automated image selection](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### Backlinking Strategy

  - [Meeting with Puerto Vallarta Tourist Bureau yielded positive results](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Adventures Group and Tourist Bureau are top two organic search leaders for the destination](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Collaborative content creation planned, starting with nightlife article](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [1:1 link exchange agreement established for ongoing mutual benefit](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Recommendation for Cancun and Cabo teams to identify and approach similar partners](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Performance Overview

  - [Continued positive trend in impressions and clicks across all locations](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Slight slowdown in content publishing due to necessary dolphin-related updates](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Vallarta leading in competitive positioning, followed closely by Tourist Bureau](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tiandra to address comments on the Catamaran article](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Mara to follow up with engineering team on automated publishing timeline](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Mara to flag pending articles for Lorena's review](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Lorena and Angelica to run competitive positioning maps for their locations](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Cancun and Cabo teams to identify potential backlinking partners](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Continue work on about page refreshes for three destinations](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Proceed with creating introductory texts and SEO packages for groupings/landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/achrvuQ8f1Nah-hDvJxioUeL7PdsbDZK?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
